playerCharacters.name: Elandor Sunwhisper
playerCharacters.description: A tall, slender elf with silver hair and eyes that glow faintly when he casts spells. He wears deep blue robes embroidered with silver thread.
playerCharacters.personalityTraits: I use polysyllabic words that convey the impression of great erudition.
playerCharacters.ideals: Knowledge. The path to power and self-improvement is through knowledge.
playerCharacters.bonds: I've been searching my whole life for the answer to a specific question.
playerCharacters.flaws: I speak without thinking and invariably insult others.

image.description: A portrait of Elandor holding a glowing staff.
image.prompt: High fantasy digital painting of a male high elf wizard, silver hair, blue robes, holding a staff with a blue crystal, library background, dramatic lighting

skills.name: Arcana
skills.description: Measures your ability to recall lore about spells, magic items, eldritch symbols, magical traditions, the planes of existence, and the inhabitants of those planes.

skills.name: History
skills.description: Measures your ability to recall lore about historical events, legendary people, ancient kingdoms, past disputes, recent wars, and lost civilizations.

skills.name: Investigation
skills.description: Measures your ability to deduce the location of a hidden object, discern from the appearance of a wound what kind of weapon dealt it, or determine the weakest point in a tunnel that could cause it to collapse.

attacks.name: Fire Bolt
attacks.description: Ranged Spell Attack. You hurl a mote of fire at a creature or object within range.

spells.name: Magic Missile
spells.description: You create three glowing darts of magical force. Each dart hits a creature of your choice that you can see within range.

spells.name: Burning Hands
spells.description: As you hold your hands with thumbs touching and fingers spread, a thin sheet of flames shoots forth from your outstretched fingertips.

spells.name: Misty Step
spells.description: Briefly surrounded by silvery mist, you teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space that you can see.

features.name: Arcane Recovery
features.description: Once per day when you finish a short rest, you can choose expended spell slots to recover.

features.name: Darkvision
features.description: Accustomed to twilit forests and the night sky, you have superior vision in dark and dim conditions.

features.name: Fey Ancestry
features.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put you to sleep.
